lines.english: Why did Mr. Gilbert telephone Dr. Millington?
lines.chinese: 吉尔伯特先生为什么给米林顿医生打电话？
lines.raw: Why did Mr. Gilbert telephone Dr. Millington? | 吉尔伯特先生为什么给米林顿医生打电话？

lines.english: While John Gilbert was in hospital,
lines.chinese: 约翰·吉尔伯特住院期间，
lines.raw: While John Gilbert was in hospital, | 约翰·吉尔伯特住院期间，

lines.english: he asked his doctor to tell him
lines.raw: he asked his doctor to tell him | 他请医生告诉他

lines.english: whether his operation had been successful,
lines.raw: whether his operation had been successful, | 他的手术是否成功，

lines.english: but the doctor refused to do so.
lines.raw: but the doctor refused to do so. | 但医生拒绝了。

lines.english: The following day,
lines.raw: The following day, | 第二天，

lines.english: the patient asked for a bedside telephone.
lines.chinese: 病人要了一部床头电话。
lines.raw: the patient asked for a bedside telephone. | 病人要了一部床头电话。

lines.english: When he was alone,
lines.raw: When he was alone, | 他独处时，

lines.english: he telephoned the hospital exchange
lines.raw: he telephoned the hospital exchange | 他给医院总机打电话

lines.english: and asked for Doctor Millington.
lines.raw: and asked for Doctor Millington. | 要求找米林顿医生。

lines.english: When the doctor answered the phone,
lines.raw: When the doctor answered the phone, | 医生接电话后，

lines.english: Mr. Gilbert said he was inquiring about a certain patient,
lines.chinese: 吉尔伯特先生说他正在询问一位病人，
lines.raw: Mr. Gilbert said he was inquiring about a certain patient, | 吉尔伯特先生说他正在询问一位病人，

lines.english: a Mr. John Gilbert.
lines.raw: a Mr. John Gilbert. | 约翰·吉尔伯特先生。

lines.english: He asked if Mr. Gilbert's operation had been successful
lines.chinese: 他问吉尔伯特先生的手术是否成功，
lines.raw: He asked if Mr. Gilbert's operation had been successful | 他问吉尔伯特先生的手术是否成功，

lines.english: and the doctor told him that it had been.
lines.raw: and the doctor told him that it had been. | 医生告诉他成功了。

lines.english: He then asked when Mr. Gilbert would be allowed to
lines.chinese: 他又问吉尔伯特先生何时可以
lines.raw: He then asked when Mr. Gilbert would be allowed to | 他又问吉尔伯特先生何时可以

lines.english: go home and the doctor told him
lines.raw: go home and the doctor told him | 回家，医生告诉他

lines.english: that he would have to stay
lines.raw: that he would have to stay | 他必须在医院

lines.english: in hosptial for another two weeks.
lines.raw: in hosptial for another two weeks. | 再住两周。

lines.english: Then Dr. Millington asked the caller
lines.chinese: 接着米林顿医生问打电话的人
lines.raw: Then Dr. Millington asked the caller | 接着米林顿医生问打电话的人

lines.english: if he was a relative of the patient.
lines.raw: if he was a relative of the patient. | 他是不是病人的亲属。

lines.english: 'No,' the patient answered,
lines.raw: 'No,' the patient answered, | “不，”病人回答说，

lines.english: 'I am Mr. John Gilbert.'
lines.raw: 'I am Mr. John Gilbert.' | “我就是约翰·吉尔伯特先生。”
